title: Enterolobium schomburgkii
taxonomy: Enterolobium schomburgkii is classified under the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume or pea family. This plant belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and the genus Enterolobium. It is native to South America and is also known as the 'jupari' or 'schomburgkia'. The classification is based on its characteristics, such as its large, showy flowers and its pod-like fruit. Further classification details include its classification within the order Fabales and the rank of family and above within the plant kingdom.
